allow: PowerShell($d='C:\\Users\\User\\kenya-timetable-system'; "--- has .env? ---"; \(Test-Path "$d\\.env"\); "--- supabase dir ---"; Get-ChildItem "$d\\supabase" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20 -ExpandProperty FullName; "--- supabase deps ---"; \(Get-Content "$d\\package.json" | Select-String 'supabase|"dev"'\))
